name: phase-1-canonical-review-schema
description: Normalized review shape produced by the Phase 1 ingestion pipeline.

source.description: Normalized source identifier: app_store or play_store.

title.description: Optional review title after privacy sanitization.

review_text.description: English review body after emoji removal and privacy sanitization. Reviews with 6 words or fewer are excluded before they reach this schema.

review_date.description: Normalized review date in ISO-8601 format.

language.description: Normalized language for retained reviews. Phase 1 currently keeps English reviews only, so retained values should be en.

ingested_at.description: UTC timestamp for when the review entered the normalized dataset.

review_id_hash.description: Stable SHA-256 hash used for deduplication and traceability.
